title: Rainbow Designs Official Paddington Bear Soft Toy - Soft Plush Teddies for Babies and Toddlers - Perfect Unisex Paddington Teddy Bear, 8 x 13.5 x 13 cm, Blue,red
features: UNIQUE GIFT IDEA: Presented in a colourful Union Jack bag, this delightful Paddington Bear soft toy is the perfect gift. With his iconic red hat and cute details, this soft toy is a thoroughly British present, perfect for Paddington Bear collectors.

THE IDEAL PLAYTIME COMPANION: This lovely Paddington Bear teddy is the ideal companion for little ones who love adventures. Inspired by the original story books by Michael Bond with illustrations by Peggy Fortnum.

ICONIC DETAILS: This detailed teddy bear is impossible not to recognise, with a bright red felt hat that Paddington Bear wears on all his adventures. The blue soft duffle coat features tiny embroidered toggles, so even the most devoted Paddington Bear fan will be thrilled.

IDEAL BRITISH SOUVENIR: This classic British children's character is the perfect souvenir after a trip to Paddington Station or to remember a week's adventure in the city of London. With a bright Union Jack flag on the bag, surprise your loved ones with this timeless keepsake.

SUITABLE FROM BIRTH: This beautiful teddy bear is suitable from birth, making it a thoughtful gift for any new baby, made from super soft fabric. Presented in a celebration gift bag, delight any new parents with this beautiful baby teddy bear.
description: From the manufacturer This adorable Paddington Bear teddy bear is the perfect gift, presented in a bright Union Jack bag featuring the Peggy Fortnum illustration that this loveable character was based on. If you're looking for a teddy bear gift, Paddington Bear is the ultimate companion and he's already in a celebratory gift bag, so you don't even need to wrap him up! This nostalgic British bear has been loved by generations of children, and this classic Paddington Bear teddy bear makes a beautiful souvenir or keepsake. The soft teddy is a beautiful gift for new babies, as it's suitable from birth and packaged in a lovely gift bag to sit in pride of place on a nursery shelf. Made out of super soft fabric, this little bear is designed for cuddles and comfort. It's also the perfect present for older children who love the Adventures of Paddington TV show, so they can reenact adventures with their favourite cute teddy bear from the screen. From tea parties to a bear hunt in the woods, encourage your child's imagination with their favourite Paddington Bear plush toy. Cute and cuddly, with a soft felt hat and a bag to carry him around in, it's impossible not to love this charming Paddington Bear soft toy. Inspired by the classic children's character, this official Paddington Bear toy has been carefully created by the experts at Rainbow Designs. With a range of unique details, like Paddington Bear's red felt hat and blue duffle coat, this Paddington Bear teddy is the perfect gift for any collector. This British teddy bear is a thoughtful gift for any fans of the UK and is ideal for Paddington Bear fans both young and old. Does the Paddington Bear need gift wrapping? No, this delightful cuddly toy comes in a Union Jack gift bag, so there is no need to worry about wrapping. He's ready to give as a gift! Is the Paddington Bear teddy bear suitable for children? Yes, this stunning British teddy bear has been designed for children from birth, so you don't have to worry. He's the perfect companion for children of all ages and they can carry him around in the fun bag and take him wherever they go.
